User.title: User
User.description: Registered user profile and system status document

displayName.description: The display name of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

lastLogin.description: Timestamp when the user last logged in

plan.description: The subscription or system privilege plan of the user

enabled.description: Whether the user account is enabled

booksCreated.description: Total number of KDP books created by the user

booksDownloaded.description: Total number of books exported or downloaded by the user

lastActivity.description: Timestamp of the user's last dynamic interaction

notes.description: Admin notes regarding the user account

usage.description: AI generation credits or usage metric

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Log entry recording administrative or user events

uid.description: The UID of the user who triggered the event

email.description: The email of the user who triggered the event

level.description: The severity level of the event

message.description: Detailed log message describing the action

ip.description: IP address of the client if available

/users/{uid}.description: Collection of user metadata and configuration records

/activity_logs/{logId}.description: Audit trail database recording security and administrative actions
